title: KatanaTachi
description: Replaces swords with katana models; sheathable!
body:
## _Featuring_
- New Swords' models & textures
- Text replacements for ```English [US/UK] & Russian/Русский & Japanese/日本語)```
- **Right-handed** and **Left-handed** versions available
- Depending on user's selected version, a katana held in corresponding version's main hand will render itself drawn and sheathed in off hand 
- **BEWARE** that if you picked _LEFT HANDED_ version, then right handed entities (both mobs & players) will be most likely having their katanas held in main hand appear sheathed and unsheathed in their off hand
